parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the customer as returned in the response of a previous PUT request.

parameters.name: account
parameters.description: The Stellar or Muxed Account authenticated with the Platform via SEP-10.

parameters.name: memo
parameters.description: The memo value identifying a customer with a shared account, where the shared account is `account`.

parameters.name: memo_type
parameters.description: The type of memo used to identify a customer with a shared account.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description:
The type of action the customer is being KYCd for. See the
[Type Specification](https://github.com/stellar/stellar-protocol/blob/master/ecosystem/sep-0012.md#type-specification)
documented in SEP-12.

parameters.name: transaction_id
parameters.description:
The transaction id with which the customer's info is associated. When information from the customer depends on the
transaction (e.g., more information is required for larger amounts)

parameters.name: lang
parameters.description:
Defaults to `en`. Language code specified using ISO 639-1. Human readable descriptions, choices, and
messages should be in this language.
